other_observers: none; Found by me. Not sure if anyone else saw this bird.
specific_location: Arkansas River, below Pueblo Reservoir dam, in the Valco Ponds/Rock Canyon area.
description: A small shorebird with yellow legs, and short bill, about an inch or two smaller than the nearby Baird's Sandpiper.Behaviors: Walking around in the rocks along the Arkansas River with a Baird's Sandpiper and Killdeer.Call: nonePlumage: winter
